title: The Spices Board Act, 1986
full_text: The Spices Board Act, 1986 मसाला बोर्ड अधिनियम, 1986 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 198610 Act Number: 10 Enactment Date: 1986-03-20 Act Year: 1986 Short Title: The Spices Board Act, 1986 Hindi Title: मसाला बोर्ड अधिनियम, 1986 Long Title: An Act to provide for the constitution of a Board for the development of export of spices and for the control of cardamom industry including the control of cultivation of cardamom and matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Commerce and Industry Department: Department of Commerce Enforcement Date: 26-02-1987 Notification: 26th February, 1987, vide Notification No. S.O. 122(E), dated 26th February, 1987, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Schedule 1.
